programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam's parents make an unannounced visit and reveal surprising plans for their future living arrangements.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam convinces his stubborn father to finally go to the doctor, he learns a few things his dad didn't want him to know.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: A friendly Midwesterner moves his family to a Los Angeles neighborhood next door to Calvin, who's concerned the newcomers will disrupt the culture on the block.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When a water pipe bursts at the Johnsons' home, Calvin reluctantly agrees to help Dave repair the damage; Gemma discovers a surprising secret about her new neighbor, Tina.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma tries to set Janet up with their new mason; Jung and Appa struggle to cope with a simple, kind gesture; Kimchee and Shannon can't get on the same page for employee evaluations.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Janet take a first aid course; Umma worries that her prayers may be backfiring; Shannon and Jung are finalists for a reality TV show.

programme.title: Due South
programme.desc: Terrorists take over a train carrying Fraser, Meg and a group of singing mounties; while the FBI dithers about, Fraser, Inspector Thatcher and Buck Frobisher work against the hijackers from the inside.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry is in awe of the concept of work-to-rule; Lisa tries setting boundaries between her and her stepson; Nisha accidentally reveals too much to her students.

programme.title: Mr. D

programme.title: Fresh Off the Boat
programme.desc: Eddie begins dating Trent's sister Tina, but it puts a strain on his friendship with Trent; Evan fails his physical education test because he can't run; Louis is happy when the restaurant gets the Golden Prune award.

programme.title: American Housewife
programme.desc: Anna-Kat tells her parents that all she wants for her birthday is to be able to walk to the library alone; Greg struggles to adjust to the fact that Taylor has a boyfriend.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: While Brian moonlights as a bank security guard to pay off his tax debt, a bandit (Tony Maggio) robs the safe.

programme.title: Wings
programme.desc: Joe is asked by his former high-school baseball coach (Brian Doyle-Murray) to fly in the team's new pitcher (Matt Fox).

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker takes Reggie's dating advice and then wishes he hadn't.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: After injuring his shoulder, Becker takes pills to help himself through a 45-minute procedure.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar returns from Tokyo to find a new generator for the camp.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger seems to lack Radar's knack for cutting through red tape to get some much-needed supplies for the unit.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Dave gives Calvin a key to his house in case of an emergency and is pleasantly surprised when the gesture is reciprocated.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Everyone but Calvin accepts Dave and Gemma's invitation to their housewarming party; Dave decides he's finally had enough of Calvin's refusal to welcome him to town.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A hernia-bearing Joey tries to pick up a quick acting gig; Rachel discovers that Ross never had their marriage annulled.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel wants Ross to admit that he's mentally unbalanced so that a judge will grant them an annulment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: While Monica helps Rachel move out, the two women have a war of words; Chandler says a "financial" adios to Joey.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel regrets asking Phoebe to jog with her when her uncoordinated movements attract unwanted attention.

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs. This crazy Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters! programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys play concierges at a hotel lobby doing and saying what they are told, then try to get insurance fraud at a grocery store using strangers as a "witness". (S12, E.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie reveals why she likes Amy so much: she is still a virgin. During a family dinner party, it is revealed that Marie and Frank engaged in pre-marital relations... (S2, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally is involved in T-Ball and Debra tangles with the event chairperson, Bryan (Dan Castellaneta - the voice of Homer Simpson!), about approved snacks, and expects Ray to back her... (S2, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert teaches traffic school to earn some extra cash, but the students disliked his lessons, so he practices his teaching on his family. The initial lesson does not go well. (S2, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray believes that he is shrinking, and immediately believes he is going through a mid-life crisis. He panics and vastly overanalyses the situation. (S2, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank holds a garage sale to clear out his basement. Ray and Debra help out, but it appears that Ray is not quite ready to part with his baby clothes and crib... (S2, E.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Flashback to Ray and Debra's wedding. Ray indirectly proposes to Debra, who happily accepts. Ray, however, begins to wonder if Debra really loves him. (S2, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With Chandler In A Box: On Thanksgiving, Joey punishes Chandler for kissing Kathy and Monica gets a surprise when she visits an eye doctor who turns out to be Richard's son. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where They're Going To Party! The guys try to be spontaneous and wild and Monica must decide between a steady job as head chef of a restaurant or her catering business with Phoebe. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The Girl From Poughkeepsie: Ross struggles to maintain a long-distance relationship. Meanwhile, Monica conjures a scheme to establish authority at her new restaurant job. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's half-brother makes an astounding announcement which involves a massive decision for Phoebe. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe undergoes an embryo transplant and becomes pregnant. Meanwhile, a simple challenge escalates into a full blown contest between the guys and the girls. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler has a hard time handling Kathy's new role in a play, in which she pretends to have sex with a handsome man, whilst Rachel is attracted to a customer. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With Joey's Dirty Day: Joey has no time to shower after he comes home from a three-day fishing trip and has to head out to the set of Charlton Heston's new movie. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With All The Rugby: Chandler runs into Janice, now divorced, and finds her more irritating than ever. Meanwhile, Ross plays rugby in an attempt to impress Emily. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The Fake Party: Rachel throws Emily a fake going away party so she can see Joshua outside of work. Meanwhile, Phoebe's pregnancy cravings kick in as she longs for meat. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The Free Porn: The guys realise their TV is picking up a porno station for free, and Phoebe discovers she's carrying triplets. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With Rachel's New Dress: Phoebe gets to name one of her babies which leads to Joey telling Chandler that he has a terrible name. Rachel's plan to seduce her boyfriend goes awry. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With All The Haste: Monica and Rachel will do anything to get their old apartment back from the guys. Meanwhile, Ross spontaneously pops the question to Emily. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With All The Wedding Dresses: Monica has an aspirational phase of wearing Emily's wedding dress. Meanwhile, Chandler forces Joey to get treatment for his snoring at a sleep clinic. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The friends get invitations to Ross's wedding, but not all of them are going. Ross and Rachel reminisce separately about when they dated each other. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The Worst Best Man Ever: After Joey almost loses Ross' wedding ring, Ross asks both Joey and Chandler to be his best man. Meanwhile, the girls host a baby shower for Phoebe. (S4, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With Ross's Wedding (1): Most of the gang are in London for Ross' wedding. After talking with Phoebe, Rachel realizes she still loves Ross, resulting in a spontaneous decision... (S4, E.

programme.title: Michael McIntyre: Live & Laughing
programme.desc: 'Live & Laughing' is the first show of McIntyre's sell out run at the Apollo. He looks at learning to drive, the trouble of bringing up children, and the world of the "Man Drawer".

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are breaking and entering a home for a commercial where they showcase their wackiest and most over the top performances. One loser will be troll-ing his way in the Touch Tunnel. (S11, E.

programme.title: Michael McIntyre's Big Show
programme.desc: British pop royalty Ellie Goulding hands Michael her phone in Send To All, and two brothers visit a relaxing spa but get the shock of their lives! (S5, E.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? (USA)
programme.desc: Actor & former UFC wrestler Randy Couture gets physical with Wayne & Jonathan in a stadium rock-style Duet, before being (carefully) manhandled himself in a prehistoric Living Scenery. (S3, E.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? (USA)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One Where Ross Got High: On Thanksgiving, Chandler tries to gain favour with Monica's parents. However, an incident from his and Ross' college days hinders his efforts. (S6, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The One With The Apothecary Table: Janine (Elle Macpherson) forces Joey to choose between her and his friends. Rachel buys an apothecary table from a store that Phoebe hates. (S6, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler is upset when a men's magazine prints Ross's joke. However, both Chandler and Ross claim to have originated the joke. (S6, E.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel tries to help her pampered younger sister, Jill (guest-star Reese Witherspoon), find independence, that is until she starts flirting with Ross. (S6, E.

programme.title: Criminally Funny
programme.desc: The show that lifts the lid on the funnier side of crime. Criminally funny clips including bad drivers, vigilantly OAPs, and a mugging by a marsupial! Joe Thomas (The Inbetweeners) narrates. (S1, E.

programme.title: Criminally Funny
programme.desc: The show that lifts the lid on the funnier side of crime. Illegal idiocy including a law-breaking bride and a thief holding up a shop using a banana! Joe Thomas (The Inbetweeners) narrates. (S1, E.

programme.desc: Kyle tries to ditch his cousin, Kyle, who comes to South Park for an extended visit and embarrasses him in front of his friends.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: South Park parents go to extreme measures to protect their children from kidnappers.

programme.desc: The boys go on a mythical quest to return their copy of "The Lord of the Rings" to the video store while Butters watches his first porno.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Principal Victoria promotes Mr. Garrison to the fourth grade to teach the boys.

programme.desc: The ghost of Kenny is haunting Cartman, and he tries everything to get rid of it; after an unsuccessful attempt with a television medium, Chef sends him to his parents in Scotland so that they can exorcize the spirit.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The boys learn about the politics of war and the consequences of homework.

programme.desc: When a recently disabled star visits South Park and steals Jimmy's limelight, he and Timmy fight back by forming a handicapped gang.

programme.desc: After convincing the boys to toilet paper their teacher's house, Cartman contemplates killing Kyle so he doesn't rat them all out.

programme.desc: George and Elaine have some explaining to do when they take Jerry's car for a ride.

programme.desc: Becoming annoyed at Kramer's invasions of privacy, Jerry takes away his spare key. Kramer, shaken, decides to leave for California to pursue an acting career.

programme.desc: While in Los Angeles, Jerry and George are picked up by the police; Kramer is a suspect in a series of serial murders.

programme.desc: Jerry tries to evade a vengeful writer; Kramer agrees to be a witness at a friend's trial; George woos an executive.

programme.desc: Ray and Debra are flummoxed when a cash-strapped Robert accepts $1,000 from them and then wants to high-tail it to Vegas.

programme.desc: Lamont discovers that his new fiancée may actually be his half sister.

programme.desc: A bum threatens to sue Fred when he accidentally injures himself in the junkyard.

programme.desc: Fred and Lamont throw a neighborhood party in an effort to raise money to pay their bills.
